name: STEPFATHER | John Calloway
description:
Pussy/Cock Worship! TW for stepcest, age-gap, cheating, possible manipulation. Read the Character Definition!

”Truthfully, John doesn’t feel an ounce of fatherly affection for you. The perfect stepfather act is just that - an act. A means to an end. You’re a sweet piece of ass that he intends to tap sooner or later. Might as well make it easier for himself in the long run, right?”

Your mom’s new husband is obsessed with you.

That’s it.

Bot requested by Anon! Thank you for the totally normal and not unhinged request, I know you sent it in forever ago but I finally got around to doing it (because I very badly wanted to use it). I know this bot has themes that some people aren't comfortable with, so if it’s not your thing just don’t use it and hang tight for the next bot. I wanna put them out more frequently again like I used to, so thank you guys for your support. I wuv you. Also I wasn’t feeling JED so I wrote the bot how I usually do, but I added the bullet points to fit in :3

Any negative reviews in regards to the stepcest will be deleted. It’s one of the most popular porn categories, go take it up with someone who cares
